data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — (a) ticket-edit.sh: added 'tags' to ALLOWED_FIELDS and updated usage string to include --tags=VALUE; (b) ticket-reducer.py: added 'tags': [] to initial state dict, added tags-specific EDIT handling that splits comma-separated string into list; (c) ticket-show.sh: no changes needed — it already outputs raw reducer JSON which naturally includes all state fields including tags.
